channel.title: TPIA Records on Aiether
channel.description: Recent content in TPIA Records on Aiether

item.title: AG Complaint: CCSO Claimed 'No Records' for Employees Named in a State Investigation
item.description:
Submitted to the Texas Office of the Attorney General, Open Government Division, May 8, 2026. OAG Complaint No. OR-26-024051-IC.

██████████████████ ██████████████████████████████ ████████████████, TX █████ ████████████████ ██████████████████████████████

May 2, 2026

VIA ONLINE SUBMISSION / EMAIL

Office of the Attorney General of Texas Open Government Division P.O. Box 12548 Austin, Texas 78711

Re: Complaint — False “No Responsive Records” Response Colorado County Sheriff’s Office Request Dated April 23, 2026 Response Dated April 30, 2026

item.title: TPIA Request: Employment Records — Faith Marie Bannert
item.description:
Submitted via email to the Colorado County Sheriff’s Office, May 2, 2026.

May 2, 2026

VIA EMAIL

Colorado County Sheriff’s Office Attn: Custodian of Records 304 Spring Street Columbus, TX 78934

Re: Public Information Request — Employment Records, Faith Marie Bannert

Pursuant to the Texas Public Information Act, Tex. Gov’t Code Chapter 552, I hereby request the following public records pertaining to Faith Marie Bannert, who served as a Jailer at the Colorado County Sheriff’s Office from February 14, 2025 through February 7, 2026 under a Temporary Jailer License:

item.title: TPIA Request: Personnel Records — Lt. Holly Smith & Jailer Perla Flores
item.description:
Submitted via email to the Colorado County Sheriff’s Office, April 23, 2026. Acknowledged received same day by Administrative Assistant Eugenia Behrens.

April 23, 2026

VIA EMAIL

Colorado County Sheriff’s Office Attn: Custodian of Records 2215 Walnut St, Columbus, TX 78934

Re: Public Information Request — Personnel Records, Lt. Holly Smith and Jailer Perla Flores

Pursuant to the Texas Public Information Act, Tex. Gov’t Code Chapter 552, I hereby request the following public records for Lieutenant Holly Smith and Jailer Perla Flores, both employees of the Colorado County Sheriff’s Office:
